g.text: Pi Zero 2 W + DRV2605L (haptic) + DRV8871 (solenoid) + DRV8825 (stepper)

g.text: Connectivity by matching global net labels.

g.desc: Connectivity by matching global net labels.

g.text: Pi Zero 2 W on Perma-Proto Bonnet (Adafruit #2310)

g.desc: Pi Zero 2 W on Perma-Proto Bonnet (Adafruit #2310)

g.text: DRV8825 microstep mode pins M0/M1/M2 are tied low here =>

g.desc: DRV8825 microstep mode pins M0/M1/M2 are tied low here =>

g.text: full-step default. Tie all three to +3V3 for 1/32 ustep.

g.desc: full-step default. Tie all three to +3V3 for 1/32 ustep.

g.text: RST/SLP must be high for the driver to run.

g.desc: RST/SLP must be high for the driver to run.

g.text: Set Vref pot to ~0.42 V (=> ~0.67 A/phase) before powering motor.

g.desc: Set Vref pot to ~0.42 V (=> ~0.67 A/phase) before powering motor.

g.text: ASSUMED CONNECTIONS that need a human to confirm:

g.desc: ASSUMED CONNECTIONS that need a human to confirm:

g.text: - JF-0530B solenoid coil polarity is irrelevant in tap mode.

g.desc: - JF-0530B solenoid coil polarity is irrelevant in tap mode.

g.text: - Stepper coil pairs A1/A2 and B1/B2 must match the chosen

g.desc: - Stepper coil pairs A1/A2 and B1/B2 must match the chosen

g.text: - The 5 V and 12 V supplies share a common GND with the Pi.

g.desc: - The 5 V and 12 V supplies share a common GND with the Pi.

g.text: - DRV8871 IN2 is tied to GND for one-direction PWM tap mode.

g.desc: - DRV8871 IN2 is tied to GND for one-direction PWM tap mode.

g.desc: named labels as the same net). Pi GPIO labels (PI_GPIO16/18/20/21,
